title: Garlicky Crumbly Cranberry Paleo Crumble
description: An indulgent Filipino-style dessert featuring garlic, cranberries, and a crumbly topping made with paleo-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: coconut sugar (or any sweetener of choice)

instructions: In a saucepan, combine almond milk and dark chocolate chips. Heat on medium until the mixture melts and becomes smooth.
Add crushed pineapple juice to the saucepan and stir well until combined. Let it simmer for about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat, add coconut oil, paleo-friendly oats, crushed walnuts, cinnamon powder, and coconut sugar. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish or tin pan. Smooth out the top with a spatula to create an even layer of crumble topping.
Place in the fridge for about 1 hour until set. Serve chilled.
